creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Alfonso S. Siciliano from comment #1)

Thank you! 

(I struggled to find the source code before opening this bug.)

Originally (prior to correction) <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/40c928e7b80a7e2ba3652f7c3dc1d30fe92e5b48>; in releng/13.1 at <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/477fbe6732feb9f37e2790f153c78dba3b7df239#diff-c2e89b24dac3b4029808582e054db23898a200e645d2384e026bd23a31bbc13cR77>. 

Currently in stable/13 at <https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/blob/stable/13/usr.sbin/bsdinstall/scripts/bootconfig#L77>, so I guess that: 

* we need an MFC of dfa5a74357f
